---
title: "Documentació"
date: 2026-07-01
description: "No ho he passat a l'ordinador però ja tinc el text a la llibreta (calma)"
categories:
  - pensament
  - reviews
comments:
  giscus:
    repo: reigborda/rampoines
    repo-id: R_kgDOTJ7a8w
    category: General
    category-id: DIC_kwDOTJ7a884DAUNP
    mapping: pathname
    reactions-enabled: true
    input-position: bottom
    theme: light
    loading: lazy
---

Prova 2
